task: Keep the explicit three-fixture support matrix synchronized across top-level docs and fixture notes.
verification: bash -lc 'python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; readme=Path(\"README.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"); verification=Path(\"docs/verification.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"); fixtures=Path(\"tests/fixtures/README.md\").read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\"); assert \"Verified fixture matrix\" in readme; assert \"Current verified fixture matrix\" in verification; assert \"current verified support matrix\" in fixtures; assert \"common-indicator.Form.bin\" in readme and \"common-print-form.Form.bin\" in readme and \"i584-load-form.Form.bin\" in readme; assert \"common-indicator.Form.bin\" in verification and \"common-print-form.Form.bin\" in verification and \"i584-load-form.Form.bin\" in verification; assert \"common-indicator.Form.bin\" in fixtures and \"common-print-form.Form.bin\" in fixtures and \"i584-load-form.Form.bin\" in fixtures"'
notes: Makes the current verified support matrix explicit in the user-facing docs instead of leaving it only in fixture notes.
